title: Claude Fable 5 is Now BANNED?!
summary: A livestream analysis of Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 model, which was pulled from availability three days after launch due to a US government export-control directive. The creator benchmarks the model's performance and compares its capabilities and pricing against Claude Opus 4.8.
writeup: This livestream from Cole Medin analyzes Anthropic's Claude Fable 5, which was pulled from availability three days after launch under a US government export-control directive. Medin benchmarks the model's performance and weighs its capabilities and pricing against Claude Opus 4.8. The stream also touches on jailbreak considerations alongside the export-control context behind the removal.
